raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Intergenerational housing helps address the isolation and depression often suffered by seniors.",
    "Intergenerational housing provides an environment that supports socialization and transitioning of youth.",
    "The financing mechanism most used for developing senior housing in California effectively prohibits inclusion of affordable housing units for others in the same building.",
    "SB 591 would allow tax credit-financed affordable intergenerational housing projects in which at least 80% of the units are occupied by seniors.",
    "‘Earn and learn’ programs provide job training and employment during the training period.",
    "ESEs and worker cooperatives provide evidence-based job and life skills training to individuals with barriers to employment.",
    "Offering skills training and employment together is one of the best ways to enable successful returns to the workforce."
  ]
}
```
